scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/runner && npm run build --workspace=apps/server
scripts.build:cli: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/runner && npm run build --workspace=packages/cli
scripts.dev: concurrently --names server,web --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/runner/dist apps/server/dist apps/web/dist packages/shared/dist packages/cli/dist
